name: taiwan-compliance-governance
description: Verify Taiwan legal sources and draft evidence-linked D00-D12 compliance modules.

interface.shortDescription: Taiwan legal verification and compliance drafting.
interface.longDescription: Separates official Taiwan legal verification from drafting D00-D12 domain modules with Core, Role-Based, and Conditional applicability for electromechanical and lifting work.
defaultPrompt: Verify the Taiwan legal basis for the next compliance module.
Draft one approved D00-D12 domain compliance module from verified evidence.
